name: Plan Cartesian Motion
description: Plan a linear-in-tool-space motion through waypoints. Result is cached; trigger via `compute`.

inputParameters.name: planner
inputParameters.description: A planner that supports plan_cartesian_motion (e.g. MoveItPlanner, PyBulletPlanner, AnalyticalKinematicsPlanner).

inputParameters.name: waypoints
inputParameters.description: FrameWaypoints or PointAxisWaypoints to interpolate through.

inputParameters.name: start_state
inputParameters.description: Starting RobotCellState. The robot's configuration in this state is used as the seed.

inputParameters.name: group
inputParameters.description: Planning group name. Defaults to the cell's main planning group.

inputParameters.name: max_step
inputParameters.description: Maximum interpolation step in meters. Defaults to 0.01.

inputParameters.name: avoid_collisions
inputParameters.description: If True, the planner checks for collisions along the path. Defaults to True.

inputParameters.name: compute
inputParameters.description: Trigger planning. Defaults to False so the canvas does not plan on every refresh.

outputParameters.name: trajectory
outputParameters.description: Resulting JointTrajectory (full or partial). The component is flagged red (with the backend error) when planning fails outright.

outputParameters.name: fraction
outputParameters.description: Fraction of the requested path that was achievable (0..1).

outputParameters.name: planes
outputParameters.description: List of Rhino planes — one per trajectory point — at the planning group's end-effector frame (target_mode=ROBOT). Computed via FK on the planner with the start_state's attachments preserved.

outputParameters.name: polyline
outputParameters.description: Polyline connecting the plane origins in trajectory order. None when the trajectory has fewer than two points.
